title: Miracle-Gro PEAT FREE Premium Moisture Control Compost, 40 Litres, Brown
features: Exclusive Aquacoir formula stores and releases water when pot plants need it to take the guess work out of watering
Fibre Smart provides the optimum balance of air and water for strong root growth
Unique combination of 14 vital minerals, N, P, K and trace elements, vital for maintaining plant health
Smart Release feeding for up to 3 months

Next page 1 Aquacoir Technology 2 Smart Release System 3 14 Vital Minerals 4 Fibre Smart Technology The perfect peat free home for your mature plants in pots and hanging baskets Miracle-Gro Peat Free Premium Moisture Control Compost is part of the high-performing Miracle-Gro peat-free range. With its unique 3-part patented formulation, this peat-free compost caters for the needs of all mature plants in pots and hanging baskets and will feed for 3 months. This unique compost provides the optimum structure for roots to grow strong and controls water availability according to their needs. Ideal for annual and perennial plants. Works well for mature pot plants. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Peat Free Premium Moisture Control Special Compost for Pots & Baskets? Caters to the needs of all mature plants in pots and hanging baskets. Its unique formulation will feed your plants for 6 months, provide the optimum structure for the roots to grow strong and control water availability according to their needs. Where can I use Miracle-Gro Peat Free Premium Moisture Control Special Compost for Pots & Baskets? Ideal for annual and perennial plants. Works well for mature pot plants. Perfect for use in hanging baskets, pots and containers. How do I use Miracle-Gro Peat Free Premium Moisture Control Special Compost for Pots & Baskets in hanging baskets? Line the basket, if required, with moss or other liner. Part fill the basket with compost. Plant trailing plants around the basket edge and upright plants in the centre. Fill the rest of the basket with compost, firm lightly and water thoroughly. How do I use Miracle-Gro Peat Free Premium Moisture Control Special Compost for Pots & Baskets in pots and containers? Place a layer of compost in the base of pot. Tap out plant from the old pot, loosen the root ball and place in the centre of the pot. Fill space around the root ball, ensuring the compost level covers all the roots. Firm lightly and water thoroughly. What have you used to replace peat in this compost? Miracle-Gro compost contains forest by-products, carefully processed into wood fibre to help you grow plants that improve your environment and make the world a more beautiful place.
